text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi Michael, this is Paul Wright. I was hoping to check on a service for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Hi Paul! Great to hear from you again. What can I assist you with today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: I need to get an oil change and a brake inspection. It’s been a while since my last visit.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure thing! Our oil change is between $40 to $60, and the brake inspection is $30.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Sounds good. How long will both services take?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: The oil change takes about 30 minutes, and the brake inspection also takes around 30 minutes.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect. Can I drop it off tomorrow morning?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, we open at 8:00 AM. What time would you like to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

text: How about 8:15 AM?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: 8:15 AM works great! We’ll have everything ready for you.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Awesome! Also, I’ve been hearing some weird noises when I accelerate.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I see. It might be worth getting a full vehicle diagnostics as well.
segments.speaker: local party

text: How much is that?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: The full diagnostics service is $100 and takes about an hour.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That sounds reasonable. Can we add that to my appointment?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! So, that will be an oil change, brake inspection, and diagnostics.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Great! Just to confirm, how long should I plan for all of that?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I’d recommend about two hours for everything, just to be safe.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Okay, sounds good. Is there anything else I need to know?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Just a reminder that we may need to order parts depending on what we find during diagnostics.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That makes sense. Please keep me informed if anything needs replacement.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Of course! We’ll explain everything and get your approval before any work is done.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect. Thanks, Michael. I appreciate the detailed explanations.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: My pleasure, Paul! I’ll see you tomorrow at 8:15 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Looking forward to it. Bye!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Bye, have a great day!
segments.speaker: local party
